channel.title: cv on istvn.urbn
channel.description: Recent content in cv on istvn.urbn

item.title: cv - short edition
item.description: The one-page version of my otherwise long CV that’s easy on the eyes and saves you time! And of course, you can download it too!

item.title: cv - tldr edition
item.description: This page is an almost exact copy of my LinkedIn profile. A short version is also available, or better yet, save it for later!
